arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Eredivisie fixtures, including PSV Eindhoven vs. NAC Breda.

PSV responded to their surprise 3-1 defeat to PEC Zwolle last weekend with a 3-2 win at FK Crvena Zvezda in the Champions League in midweek. NAC Breda ended a three-game losing streak with a 2-1 win ...
